title: docs: require EC2 Zephyr builds to use prepared EBS cache
description: User clarified that the prepared Zephyr EBS builder cache should be used whenever EC2 is used for Zephyr builds/tests. Scope: update AGENTS.md and Beads persistent memory to make the EBS cache the default/required EC2 path, not merely a preference; verify the wording and searches.
close_reason: Updated AGENTS.md and Beads memory zephyr-builds-ec2 to require the prepared EBS builder cache whenever EC2 is used for Zephyr builds/tests. Verified AGENTS.md and .beads/config_kv.json contain the mandatory EBS wording and volume ID; git diff --check passed.
